  inc_cve_2024_23222.type = 'exploitation',
  inc_cve_2024_23222.category = 'C2',
  inc_cve_2024_23222.summary = 'Apple addressed a zero-day vulnerability exploited in attacks (CVE-2024-23222, WebKit confusion) enabling arbitrary code execution on vulnerable iOS, macOS, and tvOS devices after opening a malicious web page.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc_cve_2024_23222.type = CASE WHEN inc_cve_2024_23222.type IS NULL OR trim(inc_cve_2024_23222.type) = '' THEN 'exploitation' ELSE inc_cve_2024_23222.type END,
  inc_cve_2024_23222.category = CASE WHEN inc_cve_2024_23222.category IS NULL OR trim(inc_cve_2024_23222.category) = '' THEN 'C2' ELSE inc_cve_2024_23222.category END,
  inc_cve_2024_23222.summary = CASE
    WHEN inc_cve_2024_23222.summary IS NULL OR trim(inc_cve_2024_23222.summary) = ''
    THEN 'Apple addressed a zero-day vulnerability exploited in attacks (CVE-2024-23222, WebKit confusion) enabling arbitrary code execution on vulnerable iOS, macOS, and tvOS devices after opening a malicious web page.'
    ELSE inc_cve_2024_23222.summary
  END
MERGE (inc_cve_2024_23222)-[rel_exploit:exploited_in]->(cve_2024_23222)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_exploit.evidence = 'CVE-2024-23222 is a WebKit confusion issue exploited in attacks and could be leveraged for code execution after opening a malicious web page.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_exploit.evidence = CASE
    WHEN rel_exploit.evidence IS NULL OR trim(rel_exploit.evidence) = ''
    THEN 'CVE-2024-23222 is a WebKit confusion issue exploited in attacks and could be leveraged for code execution after opening a malicious web page.'
    ELSE rel_exploit.evidence
  END
MERGE (inc_cve_2024_23222)-[rel_used_tech:used_technique {phase:'Execution'}]->(tech_t1203)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_used_tech.details = 'WebKit confusion vulnerability exploited via malicious web page to execute arbitrary code on targeted devices.',
  rel_used_tech.evidence = 'Attackers could exploit the WebKit confusion issue to gain code execution after a target opens a malicious web page.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_used_tech.details = CASE
    WHEN rel_used_tech.details IS NULL OR trim(rel_used_tech.details) = ''
    THEN 'WebKit confusion vulnerability exploited via malicious web page to execute arbitrary code on targeted devices.'
    ELSE rel_used_tech.details
  END,
  rel_used_tech.evidence = CASE
    WHEN rel_used_tech.evidence IS NULL OR trim(rel_used_tech.evidence) = ''
    THEN 'Attackers could exploit the WebKit confusion issue to gain code execution after a target opens a malicious web page.'
    ELSE rel_used_tech.evidence
  END
MERGE (mit_patch)-[rel_mitig:mitigates {status:'recommended'}]->(inc_cve_2024_23222)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_mitig.observed_effectiveness = 'Apple released security updates to address the exploited zero-day.',
  rel_mitig.evidence = 'Apple released security updates to address the zero-day vulnerability exploited in attacks.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_mitig.observed_effectiveness = CASE
    WHEN rel_mitig.observed_effectiveness IS NULL OR trim(rel_mitig.observed_effectiveness) = ''
    THEN 'Apple released security updates to address the exploited zero-day.'
    ELSE rel_mitig.observed_effectiveness
  END,
  rel_mitig.evidence = CASE
    WHEN rel_mitig.evidence IS NULL OR trim(rel_mitig.evidence) = ''
    THEN 'Apple released security updates to address the zero-day vulnerability exploited in attacks.'
    ELSE rel_mitig.evidence
  END
